message:
fix: preserve __none__ sentinel in cluster filter reconciliation (#9409)

The reconciliation useEffect validated selectedClusters against
availableClusters, stripping the __none__ sentinel because it isn't
a real cluster name. This caused deselectAllClusters() to flash and
snap back to 'all selected' instead of showing no clusters.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
